data.name: Steps of Debauchery
data.detailed_description:
加入討論組


關於此遊戲



小鎮女孩萊利為了幫助她的丈夫麥克追逐夢想，搬到了城市。麥克忙於他的酒吧時，萊利全心全意地支持他，而且她總是將別人的幸福置於自己之上，這讓她陷入了意想不到的境地，她身處其中，一步步發現了更多真實自我和內心深處的欲望。

她在大學裡探索自己的性慾，揭露自己的幻想，在酒吧裡扮演女招待，與年邁的鄰居一起參加活動，與他的孫子一起冒險，而這僅僅是冰山一角。萊利的世界就在眼前，她正等待著你去探索。



在《Steps of Debauchery》中，你將扮演主角萊利，面對重重障礙，好比松鼠要穿過繁忙的高速公路。猜猜怎麼樣？你的選擇就像故事的GPS。

你會走上腐敗和勒索的不歸路嗎？還是會打敗壞人成為英雄。或者，嘿，融入黑暗 才是你的歸宿！



注意：
  • 10+小時遊戲時長，
  • 10000多張2K高畫質渲染圖，
  • 150多段精美熱辣的動畫大飽眼福，
  • 超過10萬字的故事情節劇本。



  • 自由探索發現不同地點，
  • 與 20 多個角色相遇和互動，尋找所有成人邂逅，
  • 沉浸於故事、音樂與音聲中，
  • 深入定製的用戶界面，包括兩種不同的商店菜單、遊戲中物品的庫存顯示、任務日誌（以防迷失在故事中）、展示重播功能和隱藏額外渲染的手機圖庫，以及更多功能……

    那麼，準備好盡情享受吧……

你會走上腐敗和勒索的不歸路嗎？還是會打敗壞人成為英雄。或者，嘿，融入黑暗 才是你的歸宿！

    那麼，準備好盡情享受吧……
data.short_description: 緊跟萊利的步伐——這個女孩試圖探索並釋放自己的性慾。她在酒吧裡擔任女招待，與年邁的鄰居一起參加活動，與他的孫子一起進行冒險……而這僅僅是故事的冰山一角！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 法文, 德文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 匈牙利文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文, 波蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.15 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

data.name: Steps of Debauchery
data.detailed_description:
Join the discord


About the Game



Follow the steps of Riley, a girl who moves from a small town to the city to help her husband, Mike, pursue his dreams. While Mike is busy with his bar, Riley supports him wholeheartedly and often puts others’ well-being above her own. This leads her into unexpected situations, where she discovers more about her true self and deepest desires.

She explores her sexuality in college and unravels her fantasies, takes on the role of a waitress at the bar, engages in activities with an elderly neighbor, streams adventures with his grandson and that's just the tip of the mountain. Riley’s world is opening wide in front of her, and she waits for you to explore it.



In Steps of Debauchery you get to be Riley, the star of the show, who's dealing with more obstacles than a squirrel trying to cross a busy highway. And guess what? Your choices are like the GPS for the story.

Will you go down the shady path of corruption and blackmail? Maybe you'll be the hero and take on the bad guys. Or, hey, joining the dark side could be your thing!



Check out:
  • 10+ hours of gameplay,
  • More than 10,000 high-quality renders in 2K,
  • Enjoy over 150 beautiful and hot animations,
  • Over 100,000 storyline script words.



  • Explore various locations with free roam,
  • Meet and interact with more than 20 characters and find all the adult encounters,
  • Let yourself be carried away by the story, music and sounds,
  • Dive into custom-made user interfaces, including two different store menus, an inventory display for in-game items, a quest log (so you never get lost in the story), a phone gallery showcasing replay capability and hidden extra renders, and much more…

    So, get ready to have a blast and...

data.short_description: Follow the steps of Riley - a girl who is trying discover her sexuality and unreveal her fantasies. She takes on the role of a waitress in a bar, engages in activities with an elderly neighbor, has streaming adventures with his grandson... and that's just the tip of the mountain!
data.supported_languages: English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Hungarian, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish, Polish
